rationale: In the citing paper, Shah et al. (2014) appears only in the managerial implications section as an example that posting health-related information can improve customer perceptions. It is cited alongside other broad industry references and is not used to develop the core theory (time delay, present bias, hunger), motivate hypotheses, or inform the study design and analyses. The citation functions as peripheral background support rather than a meaningful building block for the paper's contribution.
